lohen, oh lohen. a twink like you WOULD have a grip on me. should’ve seen this coming 🥀

honestly? i’m not a yandere fan. not really my thing. but lohen just gives yandere vibes all the way down, so here i am ig!!!

everything we do know about lohen is included, but please note that this is still slightly headcanon-y (for now!) this one is definitely more 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂

4/15 update: slight personality updates, albeit not much. shifted over one of the greetings from my other lohen bot, as i think it suits this one much better. that's 4 greetings total for our yandere scrunklie :')
